title: My Daily Schedule
subtitle: Customize this to fit your lifestyle

items.title: Wake up & Morning routine
items.description: Start your day with hydration, light exercise, or meditation.

items.title: Breakfast & Planning
items.description: Healthy breakfast and review your goals for the day.

items.title: Deep work session
items.description: Focus on your most important tasks without distractions.

items.title: Lunch break
items.description: Take a proper break to eat and recharge.

items.title: Exercise or hobby
items.description: Physical activity or pursue a personal interest.

items.title: Relax & prepare for bed
items.description: Unwind, read, or do light stretching before sleep.

nutrition.title: Daily Nutrition
nutrition.description: Focus on balanced meals with protein, vegetables, and whole grains. Adjust calories based on your goals.
